particles.title: Particle Lab
particles.lead: Particles mark each word's role. Tap them off and see what the sentence loses.

explore.tap_hint: Tap a particle to toggle it. Tap the legend for its full card.
explore.nuance_generic: Several particles off: telegram style — common in spoken banmal, odd in writing.

popover.single_form: Single form: it doesn't change with 받침.

drill.blocked_consonant: “{noun}” ends in a CONSONANT (받침) → it needs {expected}.
drill.blocked_vowel: “{noun}” ends in a VOWEL (no 받침) → it needs {expected}.
drill.saved_to_diary: Saved to your Diary with this explanation.
drill.diary_note: You picked {choice} in the Particle Lab.
drill.summary_garden_note: Your garden grew: 은/는 and 이/가 progress updated.
drill.replay_mode_label: Review mode · mistakes aren't logged again

spacing.lead: Tap between the blocks where a space belongs. Particles stick to the word before them.
spacing.rule_particle: 조사 sticks to the word before it — no space.
spacing.rule_eojeol: 어절 (word-phrases) are separated by a space.
spacing.rule_word_internal: These syllables are one word — keep them together.
spacing.replay_mode_label: Review mode · mistakes aren't logged again

danger.description: Permanently delete your account and all your data. This can't be undone.

review_reminders.hint: A gentle nudge when you return after a break and plants are ready. Off by default; no tracking — it only runs in your browser.

particles.name: 조사 LAB · Particles
particles.desc: Toggle particles on and off to see how the sentence changes. Beat the 은/는 vs 이/가 clash.

games.lead: Pick your practice mode. Each game grows your Korean in a different way.

ruleta.desc: Pick your TOPIK deck, shuffle and draw 3 cards. Write 9 creative sentences.

third.desc: A third game is sprouting in the greenhouse…

conjugation.name: 활용 연습 · Conjugation
conjugation.desc: Pick the correct conjugated form. Beat the systematic mistakes learners make.

register.name: 높임법 연구소 · Honorifics
register.desc: Shift between 반말, 해요체 and 합쇼체, and honor the subject with 께서 and 드시다/주무시다.

cloze.name: 빈칸 연습 · Cloze
cloze.desc: Pick a deck and choose the grammar that fits each blank. A lighter round that complements writing.

counters.name: Counter Lab
counters.desc: Numbers + classifiers: count things the Korean way.

placement.name: Placement
placement.desc: Find your TOPIK level in a few questions.

conjugation.title: Conjugation Lab
conjugation.lead: Pick the correct conjugated form. The wrong options are the mistakes learners actually make.

rule.regular: Regular: add the ending to the stem with vowel harmony.
rule.p_irr: ㅂ-irregular: ㅂ becomes 우 before a vowel (덥다 → 더워요).
rule.t_irr: ㄷ-irregular: ㄷ becomes ㄹ before a vowel (듣다 → 들어요).
rule.eu_elision: ㅡ-elision: stem ㅡ drops before -아/어 (바쁘다 → 바빠요).
rule.reu_irr: 르-irregular: 르 adds an extra ㄹ before -아/어 (빠르다 → 빨라요).
rule.h_irr: ㅎ-irregular: ㅎ drops; the vowel fuses to ㅐ (그렇다 → 그래요).
rule.s_irr: ㅅ-irregular: ㅅ drops before a vowel, no contraction (짓다 → 지어요).
rule.l_drop: ㄹ-drop: stem ㄹ drops before ㄴ/ㅂ/ㅅ (살다 → 사니까), kept before ㅁ.

master.title: 활용 마스터!
master.celebrate_body: You cleared all {total} conjugation classes. 화이팅!

escape.book_lead: Flip through the notebook and pick your story.
